arguments.summary: Read pkg/search/search.go (21 lines). Has FindExact for exact case-insensitive matching. Need to add Levenshtein distance function and FindFuzzy that ranks results by similarity.

arguments.summary: Both tests pass. Levenshtein distance verified with 6 cases including case-insensitivity. FindFuzzy searches directory tree, ranks by distance, returns matches within maxDistance.
arguments.final_answer:
Added fuzzy file search:
1. pkg/search/fuzzy.go — LevenshteinDistance() for case-insensitive edit distance. FindFuzzy(root, query, maxDistance) walks directory tree, computes distance for each filename, returns matches sorted by distance.
2. pkg/search/fuzzy_test.go — TestLevenshteinDistance (6 cases: known distance, identical, empty, case-insensitive) and TestFindFuzzy (temp dir with exact match, typo, and unrelated files).
All tests pass.
